/CAL:JURY TRIAL IN D306 BEFORE JUDGE MASSULLO/JAVS/X:DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED WITH THE CLERK/X:COUER AND COUNSEL CONSIDER DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER THE EXCLUSION OF TESTIMONY BY WITNESS G, BROWN//X:THE COURT TAKES THE MOTION UNDER CONSIDERATION BUT EXCLUDES REFERENCE TOTHE TESTIMONY IN OPENING STATEMENT/X:ALL JURORS PRESENT, THE COURT INSTRUCTS THE JURY/X:THE PEOPLE COMMENCE OPENING STATEMENT/X:THE DEFENDANT COMMENCES OPENING STATEMENT/X:CHP OFFICER SHANE YOUNG PLACED UNDER OATH, DIRECTEXAMINATION BY THE PEOPLE/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1 INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2 INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:CHP OFFICER SHANE YOUNG CROSS-EXAMINATION BY THE DEFENDANT/X:CHP OFFICER SHANE YOUNG RE-DIRECT EXAMINATION BY THE DEFENDANT/X:CHP OFFICER ANTHONY ZILL PLACED UNDER OATH, DIRECT EXAMINATION BY THE PEOPLE/X:CHP OFFICER ANTHONY ZILL IS QUALIFIED AS AN EXPERT/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 3 INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4 INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 5 INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE/X:THE JURYIS EXCUSED FOR THE DAY/X:THE DECLARATION OF ZACH WATERMAN IN SUPPOET OF MOTION TO RECONSIDER IS FILED/X:THE PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER IS FILED/X:COURT AND COUNSEL RESUME DISCUSSION OF DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER/X:THE COURT DENIES THE MOTION TO RECONSIDER ANDTHE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TOCONTINUE THE TRIAL/X:COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS SCHEDULING ISSUES/CONTD: TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 8, 2022 AT 9:00 A,M, IN D306 FORPEOPLE'S CASE, DEFENDANT'S CASE/TPPP/DOP

/CAL:JURY TRIAL IN D306 BEFORE JUDGE MASSULLO/JAVS/X: COURT AND COUNSEL REVIEW THE HARDSHIP PROCESS AND DISCUSS THE MVAR/X: JURY VENIRE  GROUP 1  IS PLACED UNDER OATH/THE COURT PROVIDES A STATEMENT OF THE CASE, DESCRIBES THE LENGTH OF THE TRIAL, AND COMMENCES HARDSHIP REVIEW/X: MEMBERS OF THE VENIRE ARE EXCUSED FOR HARDSHIP/X: COURT AND COUNSEL COMMENCE VOIR DIRE OF THE GROUP 1 VENIRE/X: VOIR DIRE CONCLUDES, PEOPLE PASS, DEFENDANT EXCUSES 6JURORS/X: JURY SWORN, JURORS ADMONISHED AND EXCUSED FOR THE DAY/X: GROUP2 VENIRE REPORTS TO THE DEPARTMENT/X: COURT AND COUNSEL COMMENCE VOIR DIRE OF THE GROUP 2 VENIRE/X: VOIR DIRE CONCLUDES, PEOPLE PASS, DEFENDANT EXCUSES 3 JURORS/X: 3 ALTERNATE JURORS SWORN, ALTERNATE JURORS SWORN AND EXCUSED FOR THE DAY/X: COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS LATE DISCOVERED DEFENSE WITNESS, THE COURT EXCLUDES THE WITNESS/X: COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS TESTIMONYBY THE DEFENDANT, THE COURT EXCLUDES EVIDENCE AS TO WHY THE DEFENDANT WAS DRINKING/CONTD: FEBRUARY 4, 2022 AT 9:00 A,M, FOR PEOPLE'S CASE/DOP
